topics.label: The Trinity
topics.desc: One God in three persons — Father, Son, and Holy Spirit.

topics.label: Scripture & Revelation
topics.desc: God's self-disclosure through his written word.

topics.label: Creation
topics.desc: God as maker of heaven and earth, and all that fills them.

topics.label: The Fall & Sin
topics.desc: Humanity's rebellion and the entrance of sin and death.

topics.label: Covenant
topics.desc: God's binding promises from Abraham to the new covenant in Christ.

topics.label: The Law
topics.desc: God's commands given through Moses and fulfilled in Christ.

topics.label: Attributes of God
topics.desc: God's holiness, mercy, omniscience, and sovereign majesty.

topics.label: Providence
topics.desc: God's ongoing care and governance of all things.

topics.label: Election & Predestination
topics.desc: God's sovereign choice of a people for himself.

topics.label: Person of Christ
topics.desc: Jesus as fully God and fully man, the eternal Son.

topics.label: The Incarnation
topics.desc: The Word made flesh — God the Son born as a man.

topics.label: The Atonement
topics.desc: Christ's sacrificial death for sinners.

topics.label: The Resurrection
topics.desc: Christ risen bodily, the firstfruits of those who sleep.

topics.label: Justification
topics.desc: Declared righteous by grace alone through faith alone.

topics.label: Sanctification
topics.desc: Growth in holiness by the Spirit's work.

topics.label: Grace
topics.desc: God's unmerited favor toward sinners.

topics.label: Faith
topics.desc: Trusting God's promises; the assurance of things hoped for.

topics.label: The Holy Spirit
topics.desc: The third person of the Trinity — comforter, teacher, life-giver.

topics.label: The Church
topics.desc: The body of Christ, the people of God gathered.

topics.label: Baptism
topics.desc: The sign of union with Christ in his death and resurrection.

topics.label: The Lord's Supper
topics.desc: The bread and cup proclaiming the Lord's death until he comes.

topics.label: Prayer
topics.desc: Communion with God in petition, confession, and praise.

topics.label: Kingdom of God
topics.desc: God's reign breaking into history through Christ.

topics.label: Last Things
topics.desc: Christ's return, resurrection, and the end of the age.

topics.label: Heaven & New Creation
topics.desc: The new heavens and new earth where God dwells with his people.

topics.label: Judgment
topics.desc: God's righteous verdict on all people and nations.

topics.label: Angels & Demons
topics.desc: The unseen realm of ministering spirits and fallen powers.

topics.label: Humanity & Image of God
topics.desc: Men and women made in God's image, crowned with glory.

topics.label: Salvation
topics.desc: Rescue from sin and death through Christ alone.

topics.label: Worship
topics.desc: Ascribing worth to God in spirit and in truth.

topics.label: Mission & Evangelism
topics.desc: The gospel going to all nations.

topics.label: Suffering & Perseverance
topics.desc: Enduring trials with hope, after the pattern of Christ.

people.label: Adam & Eve
people.desc: The first man and woman, through whom sin entered the world.

people.label: Noah
people.desc: Preacher of righteousness who built the ark.

people.label: Abraham
people.desc: Father of the faithful, called by God from Ur.

people.label: Isaac
people.desc: The son of promise, spared on Mount Moriah.

people.label: Jacob
people.desc: Wrestler with God, renamed Israel.

people.label: Joseph
people.desc: Sold into slavery, raised to save many lives.

people.label: Moses
people.desc: Deliverer and lawgiver who spoke with God face to face.

people.label: Aaron
people.desc: First high priest of Israel, brother of Moses.

people.label: Joshua
people.desc: Successor to Moses who led Israel into the land.

people.label: Rahab
people.desc: The woman of Jericho who hid the spies by faith.

people.label: Deborah
people.desc: Prophetess and judge who delivered Israel.

people.label: Gideon
people.desc: Judge who routed Midian with three hundred men.

people.label: Samson
people.desc: Judge of great strength, brought low and restored.

people.label: Ruth
people.desc: Moabite widow who clung to Naomi and her God.

people.label: Boaz
people.desc: Kinsman-redeemer of Ruth, ancestor of David.

people.label: Samuel
people.desc: Prophet and last judge, who anointed Israel's first kings.

people.label: Saul
people.desc: Israel's first king, rejected for disobedience.

people.label: David
people.desc: Shepherd, psalmist, king — a man after God's own heart.

people.label: Solomon
people.desc: Wisest of kings, builder of the temple.

people.label: Elijah
people.desc: Prophet of fire who confronted Baal on Carmel.

people.label: Elisha
people.desc: Successor of Elijah with a double portion of his spirit.

people.label: Hezekiah
people.desc: Reforming king of Judah delivered from Assyria.

people.label: Josiah
people.desc: Boy king whose reforms followed the rediscovered Law.

people.label: Ezra
people.desc: Scribe who set his heart to study and teach the Law.

people.label: Nehemiah
people.desc: Cupbearer who rebuilt Jerusalem's walls.

people.label: Esther
people.desc: Queen raised up for such a time as this.

people.label: Job
people.desc: Blameless sufferer who saw God and repented in dust.

people.label: Isaiah
people.desc: Prophet of the Holy One and the suffering servant.

people.label: Jeremiah
people.desc: Weeping prophet of judgment and the new covenant.

people.label: Ezekiel
people.desc: Exile prophet of the glory of God and dry bones raised.

people.label: Daniel
people.desc: Exile of unbending faith, interpreter of visions.

people.label: Jonah
people.desc: Reluctant prophet swallowed by a great fish.

people.label: John the Baptist
people.desc: Forerunner crying in the wilderness.

people.label: Mary
people.desc: Mother of Jesus, who treasured these things in her heart.

people.label: Jesus Christ
people.desc: The Word made flesh — crucified, risen, and reigning.

people.label: Peter
people.desc: Fisherman, denier, restored shepherd of the flock.

people.label: John the Apostle
people.desc: The beloved disciple, witness of the Revelation.

people.label: Mary Magdalene
people.desc: First witness of the risen Lord.

people.label: Stephen
people.desc: First martyr, whose face shone like an angel.

people.label: Paul
people.desc: Persecutor turned apostle to the Gentiles.

people.label: Barnabas
people.desc: Son of encouragement, companion of Paul.

people.label: Timothy
people.desc: Paul's true child in the faith.

people.label: Melchizedek
people.desc: King of Salem, priest of God Most High.
